issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in the skill examples.

scenarios.name: Single-GPU AWQ-quantized OpenAI API server
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the modern vllm serve CLI with --host 0.0.0.0, --api-key, and --gpu-memory-utilization 0.9 per the skill; baseline uses the older python module path and omits auth and memory tuning flags.

scenarios.name: Multi-GPU tensor-parallel serving of 70B model
scenarios.rationale: Treatment specifies --tensor-parallel-size 4, --pipeline-parallel-size 1, and --max-num-seqs 256 as documented; baseline only sets tensor-parallel-size without tuning concurrent sequence capacity.
